verses.text: David resolves to sing of mercy and judgment and to 'behave myself wisely,' walking in his own house 'with a perfect heart.' Integrity begins at home. The truest test of godliness is how we live where only our household sees.

David resolves to sing of mercy and judgment and to 'behave myself wisely,' walking in his own house 'with a perfect heart.' Integrity begins at home. The truest test of godliness is how we live where only our household sees.
He will set no wicked thing before his eyes and let a froward heart depart from him. He guards what he looks at and loves. Holiness watches the eyes and roots out crookedness from within.
He will set no wicked thing before his eyes and let a froward heart depart from him. He guards what he looks at and loves. Holiness watches the eyes and roots out crookedness from within.

He will not tolerate the slanderer or the proud, but his eyes shall be on the faithful to dwell with him. He chooses godly company for his court. A wise leader surrounds himself with the trustworthy, not flatterers.

He will not tolerate the slanderer or the proud, but his eyes shall be on the faithful to dwell with him. He chooses godly company for his court. A wise leader surrounds himself with the trustworthy, not flatterers.

No worker of deceit shall remain in his house, and he will diligently cut off the wicked of the land. He purges evil from his realm. Those who rule for God must not shelter the corrupt but uphold the right.

No worker of deceit shall remain in his house, and he will diligently cut off the wicked of the land. He purges evil from his realm. Those who rule for God must not shelter the corrupt but uphold the right.
